name: Terminal Knee Extension
instructions: Anchor a band at knee height, loop it behind one knee
Stand with a slight bend in the working knee
Straighten the knee fully against the band
Squeeze the quad, return slowly

name: Lateral Band Walk
instructions: Band around thighs or ankles
Step side-to-side in a quarter-squat stance
Keep constant tension on the band

name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Stand tall with dumbbells in front
Hinge at the hips, slight knee bend
Lower the weights along your shins
Squeeze glutes to return up

name: Lying Hamstring Curl
instructions: Lie face-down on the leg-curl machine
Ankle pad against the back of your lower legs
Curl your heels toward your glutes
Lower slowly with control

name: Barbell Hip Thrust
instructions: Upper back on a bench, padded bar across hips
Feet flat, drive through your heels
Extend hips to a tabletop, squeeze glutes
Lower under control

name: Dumbbell Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie on your back, knees bent
Rest a dumbbell on your hips
Drive through heels, lift hips
Squeeze glutes at the top

name: Dumbbell Step-Up
instructions: Step one foot onto a moderate box
Drive through the heel to stand tall
Bring the opposite knee up, then step down with control

name: Wall Sit
instructions: Back against a wall, knees at 90°
Thighs parallel to the floor
Hold, keeping shoulders and back flat

name: Single-Leg Deadlift
instructions: Stand on one leg, other leg extends back
Lower the dumbbells as your torso hinges forward
Return to standing with balance

name: Standing Calf Raise
instructions: Stand upright, feet hip-width
Raise heels as high as possible
Pause, then lower slowly (emphasize the stretch)

name: Captain's Chair Knee Raise
instructions: Forearms on the pads, back against the rest
Hang with legs straight down
Raise your knees toward your chest, curling the hips slightly
Lower with control, no swinging

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
instructions: Kneel holding the ab wheel on the floor
Brace your core, hips in line
Roll forward as far as you can control without sagging
Pull back to the start

name: Cable Pallof Press
instructions: Stand side-on to a chest-height cable
Hold the handle at your chest with both hands
Press straight out, resisting the rotation
Return slowly, keep your hips square

name: Side-Lying External Rotation
instructions: Lie on your side, elbow pinned to your ribs
Hold a light dumbbell, forearm across your belly
Rotate the forearm up toward the ceiling
Lower slowly, keep the elbow tucked

name: Cable External Rotation
instructions: Stand side-on to a cable at elbow height
Elbow pinned to your side, bent 90°
Rotate the forearm outward, away from your body
Return slowly with control

name: Dumbbell Scaption Raise
instructions: Hold light dumbbells, thumbs up
Raise arms ~30° forward of straight out to the sides
Lift to shoulder height in a shallow Y
Lower slowly, no shrugging
